text:
The fee for a license issued to a registration service is as follows:

(a) For the original license, or an ownership change which requires a new application, one hundred fifty dollars ($150), which is nonrefundable.

(b) For the annual renewal of a license, fifteen dollars ($15).

(c) For the alteration of an existing license required by a name change, address change, change in corporate officer structure, or the addition of a branch location, seventy dollars ($70).
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 5. OCCUPATIONAL LICENSING AND BUSINESS REGULATIONS [11100 - 12217]
### Chapter 2.5. Registration Services [11400 - 11413]
##### § 11409

The fee for a license issued to a registration service is as follows:

(a) For the original license, or an ownership change which requires a new application, one hundred fifty dollars ($150), which is nonrefundable.

(b) For the annual renewal of a license, fifteen dollars ($15).

(c) For the alteration of an existing license required by a name change, address change, change in corporate officer structure, or the addition of a branch location, seventy dollars ($70).

*(Added by Stats. 1990, Ch. 1196, Sec. 3. Operative July 1, 1991, by Sec. 4 of Ch. 1196.)*
